Lenovo-Light.summary: Lenovo-branded enterprise decks, product launches (ThinkPad / IdeaPad / ThinkSystem), and partner-facing materials derived from the Lenovo reference template.

Lenovo-Dark.summary: Dark variant of the Lenovo replica deck — for keynote / evening-launch / dark-room presentations. Same outline as lenovo-light (cover / TOC / content / chapter / ending); surface tokens swapped via brand spec §VII.
